REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF PAULINE CHAN, PAUSON KWAN NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S PRESENTED NEW EVIDENCE REGARDING OFFERS FROM A THIRD PARTY, NOT PRESENTED AND NOT CONSIDERED BY THE COURT AT THE ORIGINAL HEARING. BASED ON THE NEW EVIDENCE THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT THE IMMEDIATE SALE, IN LIGHT OF ACTUAL AND POSSIBLE HIGHER OFFERS FOR THE PROPERTY, IS MORE BENEFICIAL TO ALL PARTIES. THE MOTION TO COMPEL IMMEDIATE SALE IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Off Calendar Apr-14-2016 Set For Trial On Oct-31-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF PAULINE CHAN, PAUSON KWAN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration is GRANTED. Plaintiff's presented new evidence regarding offers from a third party, not presented and not considered by the Court at the original hearing. Based on the new evidence the Court does not find that the immediate sale, in light of actual and possible higher offers for the property, is more beneficial to all parties. The motion to Compel Immediate Sale is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Immediate Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Gary Alabaster, (415)771-0100 for Defendants/Movingn party Philip S. Kwan et al.
Judith Rentschler, (650)524-1980) for Plaintiff/Opposing party Pauline Chan.

Argued. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANTS PHILIP KWAN, CAMERON HEASTON, LI HAU, DORIS YEE, PEARL JUE, ESTHER PENTICUFF and FRANCES ECKERT's Motion To Compel Immediate Sale Of Real Property is GRANTED. The Court finds that the most resent offer is not comparable to the original offer. The order shall have a closing date of April 16, 2016. Order signed in Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
